DP.452.0000:
Route 218 up ahead is a great fishing
hole that’s almost unknown to people.
DP.452.0001:
Yes, sir!
An Old Rod is a good thing!\f
You think so too, am I right?
DP.452.0002:
Yes! Good answer!
We can be friends!\f
Here you go.
That’s my [0108,0000]!\f
DP.452.0003:
You should fish wherever there is
a body of water.\f
Oh, and by the way, did you need
any tips on using that fishing rod?
DP.452.0004:
Oh, really?
You don’t like to fish?
DP.452.0005:
First, you face any body of water,
then you use your fishing rod.\f
Next, you focus!
If a Pokémon bites, “!” appears.\r
That’s your cue to reel it in!
DP.452.0006:
When you’re fishing for Pokémon,
the first hurdle is getting a bite.\f
When you reel the Pokémon in, you’ve
got to battle it.\f
So, fishing gives you twice the fun!
